Title: The Awakened
Description: You're starting to notice the environment around you. The first step is awareness, and you've taken it. Welcome to the journey!

Title: The Curious Learner
Description: You're asking questions and learning about environmental issues. Knowledge is power, and you're building yours!

Title: The First Stepper
Description: You're making your first small changes: recycling, reducing waste. Every journey begins with a single step!

Title: The Conscious Consumer
Description: You're thinking before you buy, choosing sustainable options when you can. Your choices are making a difference!

Title: The Green Advocate
Description: You're not just learning, you're sharing! You inspire others through your words and growing actions.

Title: The Lifestyle Changer
Description: You've made significant changes to live more sustainably. Your commitment is visible in your daily choices!

Title: The Environmental Activist
Description: You participate in movements, educate others, and actively work toward environmental solutions. You're making waves!

Title: The Sustainability Champion
Description: Your actions inspire communities. You lead by example and create real, measurable positive impact!

Title: The Planet Guardian
Description: You've dedicated your life to protecting the Earth. Your influence helps shape a sustainable future for all!

Title: The EcoGOD
Description: The planet thrives because of people like you. You live sustainably, inspire globally, and your legacy will save generations. Well done, EcoGOD!
